{% extends "site_base.html" %} {% load account_tags %} {% load i18n %} {% load bootstrap3 %} {% load bootstrap4 %} {% block head_title %}{% trans "Vendor" %} :: {{ object.name }}{% endblock %} {% block body_class %}vendor vendor-detail{% endblock %} {% block body %} {% bootstrap_form form %}
{% if not object.servermodel_set.all %}

{% else %}
{% trans 'List of servermodels from this vendor' %}

{% endif %}
{% if not object.operatingsystem_set.all %}
{% trans 'No operatingsystems from this vendor' %}
{% else %}
{% trans 'List of operatingsystems from this vendor' %}
{% trans 'Version' %}
{% trans 'Versions' %} {% for operatingsystem in object.operatingsystem_set.all %} {{ operatingsystem.version }}{% if not forloop.last %}, {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
